## bus-frequency

**Value type:** `<prop-encoded-array>`

Specifies the current frequency, in Hz, of the bus. Older versions of devicetrees may contain this property on CPU nodes. The recommended practice is to represent the frequency of a bus on the bus node using a `clock-frequency` property instead. The value format is the same as `clock-frequency`.

```dts
/* arch/powerpc/boot/dts/fsl/mpc8544ds.dts */
bus-frequency = <0>;
```
